techcrunch.title: The three hard-tech moonshots fueling SpaceX’s unbelievable IPO
techcrunch.summary: Most of the value in SpaceX's IPO is effectively a call option on the company's ambitious space data center plans.

techcrunch.title: Warner Music acquires AI attribution startup Sureel AI
techcrunch.summary: Through the acquisition, WMG aims to better track when its artists' work is used in AI-generated content or for training AI models.

techcrunch.title: Jedify raises $24M to help companies arm AI agents with context on their business
techcrunch.summary: The funding round was led by Norwest, with participation S Capital VC, Cerca Partners, and Oceans Ventures. Snowflake Ventures also participated as a strategic investor.

techcrunch.title: Decart’s new world model can simulate hours of photorealistic driving — with some caveats
techcrunch.summary: Decart is launching Oasis 3, a real-time world model that generates photorealistic driving environments for autonomous vehicle testing, now available via API for developers to build on.

techcrunch.title: Meta signs first AI data center deal in India with Reliance
techcrunch.summary: The 168-megawatt facility will support Meta's global AI computing needs and can be expanded over time.

techcrunch.title: Google just fired a warning shot in the AI subscription price wars
techcrunch.summary: Google just made it significantly cheaper to enjoy its budget AI subscription tier.

techcrunch.title: How Justin Ernest invested nearly $500M into hot startups without a traditional VC fund
techcrunch.summary: Instead of spending a year raising a formal venture fund, the Sabertooth VC founder used a captive network of LPs to invest in startups like Anthropic, Anduril, and SpaceX.

techcrunch.title: Hey, Siri, here’s what I actually want from AI
techcrunch.summary: I'm desperate for a personal AI assistant, but do I really want to become the kind of person who can't function without the friendly robot voice in my phone?

techcrunch.title: Anthropic’s Fable 5 can make weirdly fun video games with the click of a button
techcrunch.summary: Anthropic's Claude Fable 5 is going to be a big hit with the web's vibe coders.

techcrunch.title: Can tech companies learn to love cheaper AI models?
techcrunch.summary: If those same AI workloads can be handled by cheaper models without affecting quality, it would mean a massive shift in the economics of AI.
